message:
refactor: complete wa-to-ft naming migration in CLI arguments and messages

Standardize all remaining WezTerm Automata (wa) references to
FrankenTerm (ft) in the main binary:

- Rename CLI parameters: install_wa → install_ft, wa_path → ft_path,
  wa_version → ft_version across all subcommands
- Update comments: "WezTerm mux server" → "FrankenTerm mux server"
- Update binary references: "wezterm-mux-server" → "frankenterm-mux-server"
- Update user-facing messages and error strings in remote setup workflow

All changes are identifier/string renames with no logic modifications.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
